changelog: CRASH FIX: Pressing DOWN from the league pills crashed the app when the cards rail was empty / still loading. Root cause was caught by v1.44.3's ANR watchdog uploading the trace: railFocus.requestFocus() on an unattached FocusRequester. Now wrapped in runCatching with a hasItems guard — if there are no cards, DOWN advances to the next page instead of crashing.

DATA: Hero and game cards now use the server's actual status field (live / final / scheduled) plus team scores when available. The 'UPCOMING GAME · FINAL' contradiction is gone; live MLB games now show real scores like '2 – 2'. Backend (sports_module.py) was updated with comprehensive status keyword recognition for all sports (basketball quarters, hockey periods, baseball innings, soccer halves, cricket overs, motorsport laps, tennis sets) and time-delta fallback when the upstream feed lags.

UX: Final games no longer pollute the hero marquee — they're pushed to the cards rail only. Hero is sorted live-first, then upcoming-by-start-time. Games more than 5h past start without a server-confirmed status are filtered out as 'almost certainly over'.
Mandatory:true so devices stuck on the v1.44.2 → v1.44.4 focus crash force-update.
